session_summary:
Session 4 starting 2026-05-10. Four commits landed across session 3 (residents importer, system-messages bugfix trio, suggestions inbox, events polish). Working tree is clean, branch up to date with origin/main.

  1) feat (29cf7c1): one-shot residents importer + 122-apartment seed run. scripts/import-residents.ts parses the building's Hebrew-columned spreadsheet (multi-floor parking, embedded phone+name free text) into the schema in a single transaction. Backs up data/raam.db before --reset. Final seed: 122 apartments / 119 residents (60 owners, 59 renters) / 257 phones with name labels / 249 parking spots / 123 storage units / 4 zones. 3 apartment shells left empty for marked-unoccupied rows. Also gitignored personal semantix tooling.

  2) fix (8bfc029): system messages — modal hang, dark-mode calendar icon, default dates. Removed revalidatePath calls from system_messages create/update/delete actions; under Next 16 + Turbopack the cache step was trapping the action response so useActionState's submittedAt never propagated and the modal froze. Client-side broadcast already handles UI refresh. Also added color-scheme + filter-invert on datetime-local picker for dark mode, and defaults start_at=now / end_at=now+7d on new messages.

  3) feat (5ab68a5): הצעות ייעול tab — staff suggestions inbox in settings. New settings tab where lobby staff submit bugs/improvements/ideas. Each item has category (bug/improvement/idea), status (open/in_progress/done/wont_fix), submitter (auto-fills from active lobbyist), and resolution notes. Cards expand inline to edit; closed items dim, won't-fix gets strikethrough. Tab label shows red badge with live open count. Tabs primitive extended with optional badge prop. Cross-tab refresh via suggestions:changed broadcast. SuggestionForm uses guard ref on submittedAt so the success effect runs at most once per save (two listeners — the tab and the badge in SettingsView — caused a re-render cascade re-firing the effect with a new onSuccess identity).

  4) feat (39f41a5): events polish — guest names, global history, list search, brand text. Required guest_name field added to guest_parking schema/form/list. Guest-parking history is now always visible; without a selected resident it shows the global feed with apartment prefix, with a resident it shows their feed. Packages + guest-parking history rows lead with apartment number alongside the resident name. /renters and /apartments got client-side search-as-you-type filters (name + apartment number for renters; number + zone for apartments) — extracted into ApartmentsList and RentersList client components. Keys tab now shows a hint card when no resident is selected ('יש לבחור דייר בכדי להוסיף אירוע'). Header: logo set unoptimized (internal app, no WebP gain) and 'רעם בטחון' brand text added next to it for both light and dark. Removed Next scaffold SVGs from /public.

stack.global_state: zustand (vanilla store + Context provider, SSR-seeded from server)
stack.runtime_target: lobby PC, localhost only — not a server deployment
stack.import_tooling: xlsx package + npx tsx for one-shot scripts under scripts/

tables: apartments (id, number UNIQUE, floor, zone_id FK, notes, created_at, updated_at)
residents (id, apartment_id FK CASCADE, first_name, last_name, id_number, po_box, type owner|renter, move_in, move_out, notes, created_at, updated_at)
phones (id, resident_id FK CASCADE, number, label, comment, is_primary)
apartment_assets (id, type parking|storage, floor, number, apartment_id FK SET NULL, notes; UNIQUE(type, floor, number))
apartment_keys (id, apartment_id FK CASCADE, nickname, is_default, is_active, is_in_lobby, created_at)
apartment_keys_history (id, apartment_key_id FK CASCADE, is_in_lobby, resident_id FK SET NULL, lobbyist_name, comment NULLABLE, created_at)
apartment_vehicles (id, apartment_id FK CASCADE, license_plate, color, model, notes, created_at)
guest_parking (id, resident_id FK CASCADE, car_plate, lobbyist_name, created_at)
packages (id, resident_id FK SET NULL, recipient_name NULLABLE, type package|envelope|laundry, direction in|out, delivered_by, received_by, is_delivered, comment, created_at, delivered_at)
users (id, lobbyist_name, is_active, created_at) — lobby staff for the active-lobbyist selector
user_preferences (id=1, data JSON blob, updated_at) — single-row prefs
system_messages (id, title, body, start_at, end_at, priority low|med|high, created_at)
suggestions (id, category bug|improvement|idea, status open|in_progress|done|wont_fix, title, body, submitter_name, resolution_note, created_at, updated_at)
schema.evolution_helper: src/lib/db.ts ensureColumn() — used several times for is_default/is_active/is_in_lobby on apartment_keys, received_by on packages, lobbyist_name on guest_parking
schema.datetime_local_storage: system_messages.start_at and end_at store browser <input type="datetime-local"> wall-clock format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM); active query uses strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M', 'now', 'localtime') so comparisons stay in local time
schema.rebuild_pattern_used_once: apartment_keys_history.comment relaxed from NOT NULL to NULL via CREATE-new + INSERT SELECT + DROP + RENAME inside a transaction with foreign_keys OFF — preserved 2 existing rows

primitives: src/components/ui/Input.tsx — exports inputBase; prevents Enter from submitting unless submitOnEnter prop
src/components/ui/Dropdown.tsx — custom button + portal panel, framer-motion, brand-red highlight, keyboard nav
src/components/ui/Tabs.tsx — sliding red underline via framer-motion layoutId; supports optional badge prop per tab
shells: src/components/Modal.tsx — portal, AnimatePresence, backdrop blur, scale-in, ESC/click-outside, sm|md|lg
src/components/Sidebar.tsx — animated width 224↔64 via framer-motion, icons-only collapsed mode, brand-red active item gradient
src/components/SearchBar.tsx — debounced live search, results dropdown, keyboard nav, race-safe via reqId ref
src/components/SelectedResidentChip.tsx — replaces SearchBar input when a resident is in store; X clears
src/components/ActiveLobbyistSelector.tsx — Dropdown bound to prefs store, pre-fills lobbyist_name in event modals
src/components/StickyMessages.tsx — fixed-position cards on the left edge, max 3, priority-ordered + color-coded
src/components/PreferencesProvider.tsx — Zustand store with debounced auto-save to user_preferences
src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx — class-based dark/light, no-flash inline script in layout

preferences_shape.selectedResident: SelectedResident | null — search-bar selection, persisted, drives /events context
preferences_shape.activeLobbyist: { id, lobbyist_name } | null — current shift lobbyist; defaults the lobbyist_name field in keys/packages/guest-parking forms

screen_pattern_now: Dropped the View/Edit toggle entirely — detail pages render the form directly (always edit). Form's onCancel is now optional; rendered only by the modal context. After save, revalidatePath rerenders server-side and form DOM state stays. See memory/project_screen_pattern.md.
events_page_architecture: /events is a single page that reads selectedResident from the Zustand store. Three tabs: ניהול מפתחות, ניהול חבילות, ניהול רכבים. With a resident selected → action surfaces (add modal, mark-delivered, log key event); without → global recent-history feeds with apartment number prefix on each row. Keys tab pre-fills lobbyist_name from activeLobbyist; same for packages received_by and guest parking lobbyist.
global_state_pattern: PreferencesProvider creates a Zustand vanilla store + Context once on mount, seeded from server-fetched prefs in layout.tsx. A subscribe callback in the provider debounce-saves any change at 300ms via savePreferences server action. Selectors split per slice (useSidebarCollapsed, useSelectedResident, useActiveLobbyist) so components only re-render on their slice.
form_pipeline: Every CRUD form uses useActionState + a *FormState type with { error, errorAt, submittedAt } shape. Server returns fail() helpers that set errorAt = Date.now() on every error so consecutive identical errors still re-toast. useFormToasts(state) hook fires sonner toasts (success on submittedAt, error on errorAt). Modals close via Promise.resolve().then(() => setOpen(false)) to satisfy the React 19 set-state-in-effect rule. NOTE: when multiple components subscribe to the same form state (badge + tab), wrap the success-effect trigger in a guard ref so it fires once per submittedAt (see SuggestionForm).
next_16_quirk_logged: revalidatePath() inside a server action under Next 16 + Turbopack can trap the action response, leaving useActionState's submittedAt unpropagated and any modal that closes on success frozen. If you have a client-side broadcast handling refresh, prefer dropping revalidatePath there.

routes./: Dashboard — live counts (apartments, active residents, zones)
routes./zones: List + add modal + per-row pencil edit modal
routes./apartments/[id]: Always-edit form (parking, storage, keys with flags, vehicles registry)
routes./events: Tabs (keys, packages, vehicles+guest parking); reads selectedResident from prefs store
routes./settings: Tabs primitive — tab 1: system messages (CRUD + sticky display), tab 2: הצעות ייעול staff suggestions inbox with red open-count badge

scripts_directory.import-residents.ts: One-shot Hebrew spreadsheet → schema importer. Usage: npx tsx scripts/import-residents.ts <xlsx-path> [--reset]. Sheet name 'דיירים ' (trailing space in file). Backs up data/raam.db before --reset. Skips rows marked לא מאוכלסת. Has helpers for stripWaPrefix (leading 'ו'), sameOwners (surname-tolerant compare), splitName (single-name fallback to '-' for NOT NULL last_name).

decisions_logged_to_memory: memory/project_overview.md — local-first lobby PC, single-building per install
memory/project_schema_decisions.md — flat residents, no buildings/floors tables, zones lookup
memory/project_business_context.md — outsourced security, app is free value-add, Moti's credit on the line
memory/project_screen_pattern.md — always-edit, no view layer, onCancel optional
current_focus: Session 4 fresh start 2026-05-10. Awaiting Moti's direction. v1 lobby-operations is feature-complete with real data seeded; events polish (guest names, list search, global history feeds) just landed in 39f41a5.
candidate_directions_carried_over: Per-key full history view (currently only the last event is shown next to each key; the table has all the data, just need a UI surface).
Persist 'recent recipients' for the package modal (free-text recipient_name autocomplete from history).
Real-data cleanup if the seeded 119 residents revealed Hebrew normalization / phone format / Israeli ID checksum quirks worth handling.
Inbox-driven items if staff already submitted הצעות ייעול since 39f41a5 went live.
Whatever new request Moti opens the session with (likely takes priority).
open_questions_for_next_session: What did using the imported real data + recent polish surface? Any bugs to fix or rough edges to address before stretching?
Are there any open suggestions worth pulling into today's queue?

current_test_data.source: Real data — imported via scripts/import-residents.ts on 2026-05-06.
current_test_data.users: lobby staff seeded for the active-lobbyist selector
current_test_data.system_messages: tested with active/scheduled/expired states; sticky cards rendered

git_state: All committed and pushed. Latest commit: 5ab68a5 — feat: הצעות ייעול tab — staff suggestions inbox in settings. Branch main is clean and up to date with origin.
session_history: Session 1 (pre-2026-05-06): three CRUD trees, design primitives, dark mode, Hebrew RTL.

Session 2 (2026-05-06): full lobby-operations system — search, prefs store, sidebar collapse, always-edit pattern, keys flags, packages flow, vehicles/guest-parking, lobby staff + active selector, system messages with sticky display.
Session 3 (2026-05-06 evening): residents importer + 122-apartment seed run, system_messages bugfix trio, הצעות ייעול staff suggestions inbox.
